compiled_state.title: [story-implementation alignment]: story DD named dso-org/template-application-nextjs but installer hardcoded navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template -> URL drift between plan and implementation undetected through review and closure
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

Story caf7-e03d's done-definition specified the template repo at 'dso-org/template-application-nextjs'. Task 0e30-57fd's acceptance criteria referenced the same URL. The installer implementation (scripts/create-dso-app.sh:226) hardcodes 'https://github.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template' — a different org AND a different repo name. Neither the task's nor the story's review caught this drift. The epic's completion-verifier did not compare the SC text mentioning the template repo against the implementation URL.

## Reproduction

1. ticket show caf7-e03d | grep dso-org — DD references dso-org/template-application-nextjs
2. grep -n 'repo_url' scripts/create-dso-app.sh — line 226 hardcodes navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template
3. Both diverge from the upstream name pattern used across epic documentation

## Impact

Compounds bug 0f2a-95c9: even if the external repo had been created per plan (at dso-org/template-application-nextjs), the installer would still 404 because it points at a different URL. Two independent URL decisions were made with no reconciling gate.

## Root Cause Hypothesis

Code reviewers (light/standard tiers) compare diff against adjacent code, not against the parent ticket's done-definition text. No automated or sub-agent step cross-checks named external identifiers (URLs, repo paths, service names) between the story DD and the implementing diff.

## Scope

Surface: dso:code-reviewer-* tiers (story-DD alignment check), dso:completion-verifier (implementation-to-SC string-level alignment), implementation-plan task spec review.

## References

- Story caf7-e03d (DD specified dso-org)
- Task 0e30-57fd (AC specified dso-org)
- scripts/create-dso-app.sh:226 (implementation specified navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template)
- Companion bugs: 0f2a-95c9 (TDD exemption gap), [next bug id] (completion-verifier gap)

comments.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Three-way name drift detected. (1) Installer hardcodes 'navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template' at scripts/create-dso-app.sh:273. (2) Story DD (caf7-e03d, archived) references 'dso-org/template-application-nextjs' as a planned DSO fork. (3) Template registry + onboarding SKILL reference upstream 'navapbc/template-application-nextjs.git' (exists). The installer's URL matches neither plan nor upstream; per 068c-1e8a, it 404s. ESCALATE: requires product decision — (A) create dso-org fork and point installer there, (B) align installer with existing registry (upstream), (C) create the repo matching installer's current string. No code-only fix resolves the drift without user input.
comments.author: Test
